author: Syriana Team
headline: AI-Powered Development
quote: Syriana Agent transformed how we build software — from code review to deployment, it's like having a senior engineer pair-programming with you 24/7.

author: Open Source Community
headline: Your Personal AI Agent
quote: Multi-provider, cross-platform, self-improving. Syriana learns from every interaction and gets better over time.

author: Power Users
headline: Automate Everything
quote: Scheduled jobs, subagent delegation, MCP servers — Syriana runs your workflows while you sleep.

author: Developers
headline: Research & Discovery
quote: Web search, YouTube transcripts, arXiv papers, blog monitoring — Syriana keeps you informed across every domain.
